prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features a black cat sitting on top of a wooden desk next to an open laptop computer. The cat appears curious as it looks at the screen with interest. There is also another keyboard located near the bottom left corner of the desk. In addition to these items, there are two cell phones placed close together towards the right side of the desk.
